text:
Date Initial agreement start date DATE 8
Fac_Type FAC_TYPE CCN Facility Type Code indicating the type of facility represented by the CCN as indicated by the code assigned to the provider by CMS. Values:
F = Federally Qualified Health Center
R = Rural Health Center
C = Critical Access Hospital 
T = Elective Teaching Amendment Hospital
X = Other Facility Type CHAR 1
FAC_DESC FAC_DESC CCN Facility Type Description Description of the facility. New data field beginning in 2017; blank for prior
